objective: Rename and normalize the six active branch sessions without losing current work context.
rules: Do not perform a full restart while current work is active.
Keep active agent count at or below six.
Replace one session at a time only after its current task reports or reaches a clean handoff point.
Before removing a session, capture its latest log tail and any changed files.
After creating the replacement session, submit the role prompt without Ctrl+C because the composer is empty.
Verify the replacement is active before deleting the old session.
Do not kill live control-plane ports 9002 or 9100.
current_decision: Defer replacement until each current session reports. Continue using current IDs for active work.
